data.raceComments: {"comment":"Another very even field will end a brilliant day of racing, and the Group 2 Sapphire Stakes over 1200m will ensure that finding the winner will not be easy. 6. FLYING FOR FUN made plenty of progress in the spring, and then resumed in great order, winning the G3 McCarten Stakes at Rosehill 4 weeks ago. She has won a trial since then, and with some luck from a tricky gate, she will be hard to hold out again. 3. GANGSTA GRANNY has not missed a cheque in 11 starts, including 5 wins. She is racing well this prep from some bad gates, and she has had no luck with another wide draw here. JMac sticks with her, and so do we. 4. CATCH THE GLORY is a very progressive mare who was put aside after winning her only start in the spring, before resuming 3 weeks ago with a brilliant win in G3 company at Rosehill. She has more to offer and has to be respected. Each-way value. 5. IN FLIGHT has needed her first 2 starts back from a spell, and she is ready now to put her best hoof forward. Include.","runners":[6,3,4,5],"exclusive":true}
